title: Slidable furniture with in-wall mounting system
abstract: A mounting system for mounting a piece of furniture in a movable manner to a modular wall system includes a side support bar that has a channel extending therethrough. The side support bar can be mounted to a modular wall system. A roller assembly is connected to the piece of furniture. The roller assembly includes rollers that can be positioned and moved within the channel to enable the piece of furniture to be selectively repositioned along the modular wall system.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  We claim: 1. A mounting system for mounting a piece of furniture to a modular wall system, the mounting system comprising: a side support bar that has a channel extending therethrough; a piece of furniture that has a support surface for supporting items or a person thereon; a roller assembly connected to the piece of furniture and movably disposed at least partially within the side support bar to enable the furniture to be selectively repositioned along a length of the side support bar. 2. The mounting system in claim 1, further comprising a vertical support attached to the piece of furniture and configured to extend from the piece of furniture to a floor. 3. The mounting system in claim 1, wherein the roller assembly includes a bracket with a first side attached to the support surface and a second side attached to a plurality of rollers. 4. The mounting system in claim 3, wherein the bracket is configured to provide a horizontal gap between the support surface and the side support bar. 5. The mounting system in claim 3, wherein the bracket is configured to provide a vertical gap between the first side of the bracket and the side support bar. 6. The mounting system in claim 1, wherein the channel includes a curved track on which a plurality of rollers of the roller assembly are disposed. 7. The mounting system in claim 1 , wherein the side support bar includes a stop positioned at at least one end of the channel to selectively limit the movement of the roller assembly. 8. A modular wall system with mountable furniture, the modular wall system comprising: at least one vertical wall, the at least one vertical wall comprising: a frame; a tile attachable to the frame; and a cantilever channel having an opening to an outer face of the at least one vertical wall; a side support bar selectively mountable at least partially within the cantilever channel, the side support bar having a channel extending through at least a portion of the length thereof; a piece of furniture that has a support surface for supporting items or a person thereon; and 

 a roller assembly connected to the piece of furniture and disposable at least partially within the channel, the roller assembly and the channel cooperating to enable the piece of furniture to be selectively repositioned along the length of the side support bar. 9. The modular wall system of claim 8, wherein the roller assembly comprises a bracket having a first arm and a second arm. 10. The modular wall system of claim 9, wherein the first arm is connected to the piece of furniture. 11. The modular wall system of claim 9, wherein a plurality of rollers are connected to the second arm. 12. The modular wall system of claim 11, wherein the plurality of rollers are configured to move along a track disposed in the channel of the side support bar. 13. The modular wall system of claim 9, wherein the bracket is configured to create a gap between the side support bar and the piece of furniture. 14. The modular wall system of claim 9, wherein the bracket is configured to create a gap between the side support bar and the first arm of the bracket. 15. The modular wall system in claim 8, wherein the side support bar includes at least one end stop positioned at an end of the channel or at least one intermediate stop disposed between opposing ends of the channel to selectively limit the movement of the roller assembly within the channel. 16. A modular wall system with mountable furniture, the modular wall system comprising: at least one vertical wall, the at least one vertical wall comprising: a frame; a tile attachable to the frame; and a cantilever channel having an opening to an outer face of the at least one vertical wall; a piece of furniture that has a support surface for supporting items or a person thereon; and a bracket connected to the piece of furniture, at least a portion of the bracket being disposable at least partially within the cantilever channel, the bracket being selectively movable within the cantilever channel to enable the piece of furniture to be selectively repositioned along the length of the at least one vertical wall. 17. The modular wall system of claim 16, wherein the bracket is slidable within the cantilever channel. 18. The modular wall system of claim 16, further comprising a roller assembly connected to the bracket. 19. The modular wall system of claim 18, wherein the roller assembly comprises one or more rollers that enable the bracket to roll through the cantilever channel. 20. The modular wall system of claim 16, further comprising one or more stop disposed in the cantilever channel to limit the movement of the bracket within the cantilever channel.
